failures.summary: Biomass at 24h reads 0.75 g/L, 5 sigma above nominal
Temperature at 24h reads 298.5 K, 3 sigma above nominal 297.0

analysis.summary: All three deviations occur at the same 24h sampling point in run RUN-A001

open_questions.question: Was the 24h sample drawn from a different vessel or instrument than earlier samples?
open_questions.why_it_matters: would explain why three independent variables all read high at the same timestamp

narrative: Run RUN-A001 shows three concurrent above-nominal readings at the 24h sample (Biomass critical, Temperature major, pH minor). Pattern is concentrated at a single timestamp; investigate sampling integrity before drawing biological conclusions.
